name: openboard
description: OpenBoard skills to connect to the board, plan multi-agent runs, validate OpenCode profiles, and dispatch and verify agent work.

interface.shortDescription: Plan and run multi-agent work on OpenBoard.
interface.longDescription: OpenBoard provides skills for connecting to a running OpenBoard app, planning a multi-agent run (workflow shape, agent profiles, models), validating OpenCode profile config before use, dispatching scoped cards into worktrees, reviewing and integrating results, and reporting verified multi-agent work honestly.
defaultPrompt: Use $startup first and make this session my OpenBoard orchestrator.
Use $startup first, then plan and run a multi-agent workflow in this repo.
